description: A vegetable farm manager needs to create a weekly schedule for their harvest crew, ensuring all tasks are covered.

nodes.task_description: List all harvesting, packing, and logistics tasks that need to be completed for the week.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles a complete list of required tasks.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the list of available employees and their skill sets (e.g., tractor operator, packer).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the list of all available workers.

nodes.task_description: Generate an optimized weekly schedule that assigns employees to tasks based on skills and availability, ensuring compliance with break time regulations.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a detailed schedule for the week.
